name: elifoot-smoke
description: Smoke test for Elifoot project using jsdom

scripts.test:unit: node tests/persistence_test.js && node tests/substitutions_test.js && node tests/offers_test.js && node tests/ai_buy_test.js
scripts.test:integration: node tests/transfer_integration_test.js && node tests/transfer_offers_integration_test.js && node tests/promotion_integration_test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:smoke
